description: Working as research assistant with [Dr. Chin Wei Ngan](https://www.comp.nus.edu.sg/~chinwn/), focusing on correctness and incorrectness reasoning.
Beginning of winter break, I am going to have a great time relaxing and recharging!

[SG PL Summit](https://sg-pl-summit.github.io) will be held in November 24, 2025 at SMU. We are going to present our work on dual language (we are the only undergraduate group presenting). See you there!
Our team has developed a web IDE for Pie, an educational language introduced in The Little Typer. It is now available [here](https://source-academy.github.io/pie-slang/)!
Me and my teammate Kyriel got into the finalist at ICFP 2025 SRC and won the 3rd prize! Many thanks to our advisor prof. Adams and everyone who supported us!
Our work: "Mini-Mu - A Language for Understanding Duality" got accepted to ICFP 2025 SRC! See you there!
Beginning of summer break, working on personal projects and the UROP project on computational duality.
Attending the STEP26 showcase in NUS, presenting the work: "Pie in Source Academy". We got Best Project Award! Many thanks to prof. Martin and everyone who supported us!
Admitted to the UROP program, working under supervision of [Dr. Michael D. Adams](https://michaeldadams.org).
On a wonderful trip across Europe.
[The first edition of SG PL Summit](https://verse-lab.github.io/sg-pl-summit/) will be held in Dec 4th, 2024. Our team will be presenting the "Pie in Source Academy" project.
